textByHash.252ab76f58ff8d77651549cf14223df745a19652: You'd have thought the masters would make it impossible for us to get bored as well.
textByHash.4221398757ba7c7f8cc18b90be78a8089ad4e198: I fell asleep while guarding upstairs.
textByHash.aed75cf8320d0c07e73e5c8a848cc252fce4392c: They told us to never press the red button!
textByHash.ba95e2c55690db43be812c533b1e3ca75cbf7e8e: I dunno, maybe I'm defective. I blame the masters myself. Anyway, I got the choice, either take this job or go outside.
textByHash.e2c56546263bb51c28e0acad3803f82badb2054e: There's someone outside! What do we do?
textByHash.e580241af8b0d738a60db0e5f05bc6d3215cf7b3: I think it's a punishment, Twenty One.
